query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.matchedBusinessLines, p.lifecycleStatus
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
AND (p.location LIKE '%QLD%' OR p.location LIKE '%NT%')
LIMIT 10;
